programme.title: E113 - Queen Holly / The Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away, but ruling isn't as easy as it looks. // Ben and Holly discover that Nanny Plum is a tooth fairy, and head out with her, but they're shocked when they see the little girl they're visiting.

programme.title: E101 - Ball
programme.desc: // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom.

programme.title: E526 - Madame Gazelle's Leaving Party
programme.desc: The children are sad because their favorite teacher, Madame Gazelle, is leaving daycare. But a leaving party will give her a good send-off.

programme.title: E602 - Desert Island
programme.desc: When a fishing trip goes wrong, leaving Grandpa Pig, Granddad Dog, and Grampy Rabbit stranded on a desert island, Captain Daddy Dog is the only one able to save them.

programme.title: E522 - Spider's Web
programme.desc: Ew! There's a spider in the house! Mummy Pig tells Daddy Pig to get rid of it.

programme.title: E523 - The Noisy Night
programme.desc: Peppa's family is staying at Cousin Chloe's house. It's been a long day and everyone is sleepy. But baby Alexander keeps everyone awake with his crying!

programme.title: E112 - The Crew Does A Home Renovation / The Crew Builds A Lighthouse
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: E113 - The Crew Builds A Dinosaur Museum / The Crew Builds A Wheelchair Ramp
programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.title: E211 - The Great Abuela Cookoff / Missing Map
programme.desc: After the Pokey Pigeons eat all of Abuela's elotes, Dora and Boots set out to find more ingredients for the Great Abuela Cook-off. / Dora, Boots and Backpack play an adventurous game of Hide-and-Seek to find Map.

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E126 - The Crew Builds A Treehouse / The Crew Builds A Chicken Feeder
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose's favorite tree might be off limits for climbing unless Rubble and Grandpa can come up with a solution. / The Crew build a feeder for Farmer Zoe's chickens, but when they get loose, it's up to the pups to safely rescue them.

programme.title: E113 - Queen Holly / The Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away, but ruling isn't as easy as it looks. // Ben and Holly discover that Nanny Plum is a tooth fairy, and head out with her, but they're shocked when they see the little girl they're visiting.

programme.title: E211 - The Great Abuela Cookoff / Missing Map
programme.desc: After the Pokey Pigeons eat all of Abuela's elotes, Dora and Boots set out to find more ingredients for the Great Abuela Cook-off. / Dora, Boots and Backpack play an adventurous game of Hide-and-Seek to find Map.

programme.title: E110 - Finders Keepers / Dancing Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto 'finders, keepers' a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: E113 - Zeg And The Egg
programme.desc: Zeg is out smashing things with Blaze and AJ when he finds a tiny dinosaur egg. Now the three friends must embark on an epic journey across a prehistoric landscape to return the egg to its Truckodactyl mother.

programme.title: E410 - Grampy Rabbit's Lighthouse
programme.desc: Granddad Dog takes Peppa, George and Danny Dog to visit Grampy Rabbit's lighthouse.

programme.title: E114 - The Elf Windmill / The Elf Band
programme.desc: Mr Elf demonstrates why it takes so long to make flour, but Nanny Plum refuses to wait, and uses magic to speed up the elf windmill. // Holly and her parents try to impress Snobby King and Queen Marigold with help from the elf band.

programme.desc: Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: E103 - The Puzzle Of The Plummeting Eggs
programme.desc: In a world of anthropomorphic animals, Sam Snow and Kit Casey are elite agents of C.L.A.D.E. (Covert League of Animal Detective Experts) who travel the world solving mysteries with their expertise in problem-solving and animal facts.

programme.title: E616 - Garden Games
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy have nothing to do, and are bored. Daddy Pig finds them an old box of garden games to play with. But not all the games are easy for little George.

programme.desc: Mr Elf demonstrates why it takes so long to make flour, but Nanny Plum refuses to wait, and uses magic to speed up the elf windmill. // Holly and her parents try to impress Snobby King and Queen Marigold with help from the elf band.

programme.title: E7 - The Roots Of Backcountry Skiing
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas visit Mount Assiniboine, the birthplace of backcountry skiing in North America. To better understand the sport's origins, they meet Claude Duchesne, who takes them on a journey through time.

programme.title: E16 - Louis Gabriel Nouchi
programme.desc: Viviane welcomes her first menswear designer! Louis Gabriel Nouchi presents his 2023-2024 autumn-winter collection, inspired by the novel ''American Psycho'' by Bret Easton Ellis.

programme.title: E1 - La Traviata
programme.desc: A free woman, forbidden love, social exclusion... ''La Traviata'' by Giuseppe Verdi was created in 1853. Extracts from the opera performed in 2020 at the Bordeaux Grand Theatre, under the musical direction of Paul Daniel.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: For Cinco de Mayo celebrations, the contestants prepare shareable dishes inspired by Mexican cuisine. On the menu: colorful pinatas, assorted peppers, and spicy dishes.

programme.title: E18 - Berry, The Heart's Choice
programme.desc: Just two hours from Paris, the Berry is a discreet and little-known land of rural charm and tranquil landscapes. Vast plains, dense forests and peaceful rivers form a simple, authentic picture, far from the hustle and bustle of the big cities, perfect for a revitalising getaway...

programme.title: E13 - Jean Boucault And Johnny Rasse/Plant Memory/Albertas Gardens
programme.desc: Contents: Jean Boucault and Johnny Rasse, bird singers; plant memory; Albertas gardens; Don't panic with Charlotte.

programme.title: E8 - Clemence D'ennery/Juliette Clovis/Rabanne/Marion Mezenge
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: E14 - At Fort La Latte, With Major Mouvement
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at Fort La Latte with physiotherapist and influencer Major Mouvement. On today's menu: confit sea bass with assorted butters and seaweed.

programme.title: E7 - Beloved Pets
programme.desc: Many pets share the lives of Parisians. They are becoming increasingly important: we love them, we spoil them, we pamper them. In addition to the cat bars that have been around for the past decade in the capital, there are now concept stores, dog festivals and spa hotels.

programme.title: E3 - Auto Retro Bourguebus
programme.desc: Meeting with the Auto Retro Bourguebus association. Laurent then goes to Ryes, to visit a couple of comic book professionals and admire their collector's Renault 4 CV. Michel presents a sporty Peugeot that was long unloved: the 309 GTI.

programme.title: E6 - Creative Belgitude: A Series Of Talents!
programme.desc: Head for Adventure Valley in Durbuy, transformed for the occasion into a realm of fear. Also Eric-Emmanuel Schmitt, writer and playwright, opens the doors of his chateau in the heart of Hainaut; the Gimber drink; Patrick Syen and his Bentleys; and the Pluriel restaurant.

programme.title: E22 - Fruit And Veggie Friends Day
programme.desc: Everyone in the supermarket is enjoying Fruit and Veggie Friends Day, where they get to celebrate friendship, but Evil Pea wants to ruin it - and Supertato keeps stopping her.

programme.title: E7 - The Treehouse Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning the clubhouse so the squirrels take refuge in the treehouse, but it's getting a little bit cramped these days. Norrie has an idea - maybe they need to add an extension.

programme.title: E9 - The Tadpole Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E30 - Fairies
programme.desc: Bluey's house has fairies! Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: E31 - Work
programme.desc: In a game of 'Work', Dad hires Bluey and Bingo at his drainpipe factory. But when Bluey takes charge, Dad finds his new boss pretty tough, especially her no dancing rule.

programme.title: E7 - Cassowary
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the jungles of Australia in search of a cassowary. Along the way, they meet some wild budgerigars.

programme.title: E44 - The Bus Stop
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E9 - Forward
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: A L'instinct
programme.desc: Teva Royer, police lieutenant in Cayenne, Guyana, heads to Nantes to lead the investigation into the suspicious death of a wealthy businessman's daughter. Once on-site, he teams up with Ana Kerjouan, captain in the regional police force. Given their diametrically opposed methods, their partnership looks set to be complicated.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie:2025-2026
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: E17 - Junkyard Meltdown
programme.desc: Four smiths must sift through a pile of junk in order to make a signature Damascus blade. After an intense couple of rounds, two smiths head back to their home forge to recreate a complex broadsword.

programme.title: E6 - Down To The Wire
programme.desc: As the season hits full stride, alligators begin changing their behaviours-and the hunters must adjust to stay ahead. Joey and Zak swap their trademark weapons to see who can nab the biggest bulls.

programme.desc: From a Michigan man who was there, Mike learns about Evel Knievel's rocket-powered Snake Canyon jump-and is determined to buy a one-of-a-kind billboard rescued from the site.

programme.title: E14 - The Hunt For Stolen Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: During WWII, the Nazis stole vast amounts of art, gold, silver, and currency, and stashed them across Europe. While some of the plunder has been recovered, much more is still missing nearly 80 years later.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E157
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E474
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E481
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: A company's flagship idol is seemingly abandoned(?) by their own agency! Stepping away from life as a popular idol, the new journey begins.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. To win, all they’ll need to impress not only the judges - Tom, Padma, Gail and Nilou Motamed, but also culinary superstars Mauro Colagreco, Clare Smyth, Marcus Samuelsson, Janice Wong, Tony Mantuano, Eighth Generation Italian Butcher Dario Cecchini and Food & Wine magazine’s Hunter Lewis. It’s a fight to the bitter end, but only one will have their second chance to finally be crowned Top Chef.

programme.title: Old But Bold - How An 81-Year-Old Sprinter Chases A World Record
programme.desc: How do you stay fit in old age? Friedhelm Adorf has the answer. The 81-year-old exercises every morning, eats a healthy diet and trains for a world record: the 200m sprint in his age group. Unfortunately, his knee is giving him problems. Will he still succeed?

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Ici l'Europe : on en débat
programme.desc: Un rendez-vous hebdomadaire qui propose un entretien avec une personnalité européenne de premier plan, suivi d'un débat entre eurodéputés.

programme.title: L'instant mobile

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: Au coeur de l'info : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Une immersion au cœur de l'information pour analyser les faits marquants du jour et en comprendre les implications. L'émission propose également des éclairages sur les grands enjeux internationaux, afin d'offrir une lecture claire et approfondie de l'actualité mondiale.

programme.title: A Fantastic Woman
programme.desc: A waitress and nightclub singer struggles to carry on when her older boyfriend dies. Berlin winner for Best Screenplay.

programme.title: Yasujiro Ozu: Good Morning
programme.desc: Two brothers take a vow of silence in a bid to make their parents buy a TV, which launches a debate about the nature of communication in Ozu's smart comedy.

programme.title: 7 Days In Entebbe
programme.desc: In 1976, 4 hijackers take over a plane and force it to land in Uganda, hoping to free dozens of Palestinian terrorists.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E6 - The Next Dynasty
programme.desc: The all-female Hollywood pride have been in exile after being attacked by the four Nomad brothers. But their leader, Ava, decides to lead her family south to the heart of their territory for a showdown with the Nomads.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage

programme.title: E5 - Creature Comforts
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a troop of rescue center monkeys that have adopted a litter of stray kittens, a loyal dog helping a rescued raccoon overcome her fears, and an emu raised by Irish setters.

programme.title: E6 - To the Rescue
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, including “ranch manager” Barclay, a Great Dane who happens to be a gifted horse whisperer. In Africa, a tiny marmoset called Thor has become obsessed with two young rescued mongooses.

programme.title: E2 - Edge of the Abyss
programme.desc: Continue the odyssey along Ireland’s west coast. Spy on the love affairs of grey seals in the Inishkea Islands and ply Connemara’s turquoise waters. Wander in Clare’s magical woods and catch hundreds of basking sharks engaged in a mating display.

programme.title: E2 - Fantastic Frogs
programme.desc: Cape Town, South Africa is home to twenty types of frogs, but many are threatened by urban development. Meet a variety of the region’s species as we follow western leopard toads on their tenuous journey to breed in the city’s shrinking wetlands.

programme.title: E5 - Living Together
programme.desc: A complex web of relationships rules all life on earth: all species are interconnected, none can survive in isolation. While some relationships are one-sided, others are mutually beneficial. From loose associations to tight-knit partnerships, everything has a place in nature’s great scheme. Complex interactions between species are not even limited to animals, and some of the best examples occur in the lush mountain forests of Africa.

programme.title: E6 - Crocs and Hippos of Ndumo
programme.desc: The Nile crocodile and hippopotamus are two of Africa’s amphibious freshwater icons, found in waterways, rivers and lakes across the continent, including the stunning wilderness of Kwa-Zulu Natal in South Africa. These two species have co-existed for thousands of years, evolving in different ways to a life aquatic.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Tide
programme.desc: Low tide exposes a band of shore called the intertidal zone. It’s a place of stunning extremes, attacked by hurricane force waves and exposed to baking heat. Creatures here have evolved in countless bizarre ways. Scientists explore this alien realm.

programme.title: E1 - Food, Glorious Food
programme.desc: Embark on a dangerous tagging mission in South Australia that will show what sharks eat and why they gather in feeding hot spots. Then head north as a team chases tiger, bull, and hammerhead sharks and outfits one with a 360-degree dorsal camera.

programme.title: E2 - Love Bites
programme.desc: Track a pregnant shark along the Great Barrier Reef and see if she leads a team of scientists to her hidden pupping ground. Then search for signs of mating along the southern coast that could reveal a very shy female megashark in search of a partner.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Tide

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage

programme.title: E6 - The Next Dynasty

programme.title: E1 - Baby John's Big Day Out Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby John on some big day out adventures! First, the family visits the zoo to see all the amazing animals, like elephants, monkeys & hippos! Then, it's Baby John's first time at the water park, where he has lots of fun with water squirters & wading pools. The adventure continues with a trip to a fun theme park, where the family enjoys the merry-go-round, bumper cars & yummy cotton candy!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E13 - Can't Dance, Don't Ask Me
programme.desc: When Kelly is faced with a choice of getting kicked out of school or joining the tap dance club, she swallows her pride, buckles on her tap shoes and performs some dirty dancing that leaves the audience sweating in their seats.

programme.title: E14 - A Three Job, No Income Family
programme.desc: When Peggy gets a job selling cosmetics and brings home more money than Al, he gets a second job to regain his self-respect, but still finds himself losing the breadwinning game.

programme.title: E4 - Jake
programme.desc: Cattle rustlers attempt to eliminate David.

programme.title: E19 - Day Of The Dead
programme.desc: While in Mexico City, Jessica researches two crimes when a mask stolen from the National Museum is found on the face of a murder victim.

programme.title: E20 - Angel Of Death
programme.desc: Jessica consoles a playwright after his wife's suicide, then realizes that he was the intended victim of a family member's murder.

programme.desc: Jessica becomes involved when Seth's former Army buddy arrives in Cabot Cove and is accused of murdering his new employer.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E5 - Beaux Beauxs at the Hobo Hilton
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don’t consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: E5 - Ukraine
programme.desc: Back in Eastern Europe, Catfish and Rooftop start their visit Ukraine dropping into the country via skydive. The adventures only get crazier from there- from wrangling pigs and racing ostriches to testing out if their heads can survive a Spetsnaz bottle break. After testing out the bottle break the duo move onto sambo, a Soviet style of wrestling and equally challenging event. The BMX bikers become the first people to trick at Chernobyl (and get a lifetime ban), but before they head out to their next stop, the two finish their trip just like they came in- airborne. Only this time they’re leaving by fighter jet.

programme.title: E6 - Bangladesh
programme.desc: With their travels taking them to Asia, Rooftop and Catfish find themselves spending several dangerous days in Bangladesh. The pair put their bodies and safety to the test harvesting honey the Bangladeshi way, transporting workers via row boat, deconstructing ships for scrap metal, and trying to clean one of the country’s rare public restrooms. They test out Bangladeshi cuisine in the form of fish, cow stomach, and goat brain curry, and race some locals on their rickshaw bikes. The trip concludes with Rooftop and Catfish heading out of town by train- only running across the top. With all of Bangladesh’s physical dangers, can the BMX bikers make it out without a hospital visit?

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E5 - Vision Quest
programme.desc: Sonya suffers from a rare degenerative eye disease and is almost completely blind, but that doesn’t stop her from braving the wild alongside Bear Grylls to rediscover her love for the outdoors. Sonya’s spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.title: E5 - Western Australia: Driving in the Dusty Kimberly
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: E4 - Mexico City
programme.desc: In Mexico City, for every baby born, two new vehicles hit these over-burdened streets.

programme.title: E625 - Fashion No Show / Doom Service
programme.desc: Leni and Carlota's working styles clash when they are both interning for a famous fashion designer, Mariella Moss. // The Louds book a stay at an all-inclusive resort, only to find the vacation is not what they imagined.

programme.title: E422 - Up The Stairs!
programme.desc: When a local celebrity chef comes to Junk-N-Stuff to do his live show, Kid Danger and Captain Man are forced to hike a half a mile up the Man Stairs so they can be on the show.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E124 - Funny Money / Shaking Bad
programme.desc: When Best breaks the last clean plate, rather than do the dishes, Best and Bester head out to buy a brand new one. // Best and Bester decide to make the best milkshake ever, only to find themselves in a bitter contest with Flip Flop.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E111 - The Butterfly Effect / The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.title: E236 - Call the Cops! / Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence! SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. // Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: E208 - Bottle Snatchers

programme.title: E203 - The Burger Games
programme.desc: Lay Lay feels threatened by new student, Cobo. When Cobo applies for a job at BoomBox Burger, Lay Lay pounces on the opportunity to show him up by applying, too. This leads to 'The Burger Games,' a competition that puts their skills to the test.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal[Live]
programme.desc: LUCKY YOU! Open the briefcase and welcome the winnings. The Pambansang Host Luis Manzano is back, together with 20 lucky stars, as they play in all‑new original episodes of the luckiest season yet of Kapamilya Deal or No Deal!

programme.title: And Ai, Thank You[Live]
programme.desc: A famous, award-winning actress learns she is terminally ill with cancer and has only a few months left to live. Facing her mortality, she begins taking unusual jobs and changing her behavior in an attempt to give back and repay people who helped her throughout her career-leaving those around her confused about her sudden transformation.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: My Puhunan: Kaya Mo!
programme.desc: a magazine program that will be the primary source of information, inspiration, and motivation for Filipinos to change their mindset and be the best version of themselves in order to achieve success in life.

programme.title: The Three Little Friends
programme.desc: Two little kids ask Mai to read them the story of 'The Three Little Pigs.' Mai doesn't want to admit that she can't read and pretends that she is reading. Yoko decides to help her by putting some pictures in the book to guide her.

programme.title: How Does a Rocket Escape Earth's Gravity
programme.desc: Leaving our planet and entering space is extremely difficult, requiring complex mathematics to calculate the amount of opposing force to escape the Earth's gravity. Just try jumping upwards. So how does mathematics help rockets beat gravity and shoot out into space?

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Vik Saves the Day
programme.desc: Vik becomes a real superhero with Yoko's magical help, but soon discovers his real superpower is being a good friend.

programme.title: Day of the Prophecy
programme.desc: Psychic Sarah tells Ricky that she has the gift of being able to make predictions. He doesn't believe her until she makes an eerie prophecy that means he will clean up. Ricky is inspired to create a fortune-telling flamingo, and the Grand Master makes a pop-up cat card.

programme.title: Cat Taxi
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat taxi.

programme.title: The Hottentots Holland Mountains - Crossing The Mountains
programme.desc: When travelling through the Hottentots Holland Mountains, the team finds an ancient ocean ox wagon trail blazed by the first European settlers almost four centuries ago. On the mountain they locate a unique plant kingdom with species found nowhere else in the world.

programme.title: Piranha
programme.desc: Carol gets a special package from Brazil-a rare Chum Chum Land piranha needing protection. But it escapes and starts wreaking havoc on the town's ecosystem! Now, with everyone's help-and Flippy as bait-Carol must catch it before it devours everything in its path.

programme.title: The Combination Lock
programme.desc: Tom Thomas locks his new game console inside of his backpack, but can't get it out because he forgot the combination. Now only little Nolik is able to get inside the lock to open it.

programme.title: Reuse into a Den
programme.desc: Daddy is vacuuming and the children can't play around. Luckily, Harper decides to reuse old bedsheets, hang them over some chairs and make a den. Inside and outside, the children have found it is simple to create a den and make a space to play.

programme.title: S.T.A.N
programme.desc: Zeke gets trapped inside a body armour suit with an overprotective AI operating system. Alicia and Noodles discover a strange “super oven” and use it to sell cupcakes door-to-door.

programme.title: Quickdraw
programme.desc: Doodle Girl finds her face on Wild West wanted posters and must clear her name before the outlaw Big Bart McBurly catches her.

programme.title: Operatic Muscles and Strawberry Milk
programme.desc: The doctors get the help of an opera singer to reveal the hidden muscle that makes you breathe. They try a mind-bending trick and Dr. Xand uses DNA to find out who stole his milk. The Ouch Mobile is open, and at the hospital someone has stapled their own finger.

programme.title: Bouncing Back
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Acrobatic Men's Four are invited to trials for the World Championships - but when it comes to costumes for the day, they realise their performance on the floor is not their only concern!

programme.title: Ghost Office
programme.desc: 'Ghost Invasion'- Tung, who has a simple and pure mind and just started his new job, is quickly attracted by his cool but sexy boss – Sam. At the same time, he meets with his secondary schoolmate in the company – Mick. Mick always talks about women with Tung, he even sets a goal of ‘counting on Sam'. Later, Tung always meets Sam because of overtime work. Sam always changes the style and image when she comes out from washroom at night, which she turns to be seducing, charming and totally different from the one at daytime...'A Horny Ghost'- The boss of a pornographic films dubbing company is a horny man, he is accidentally killed because of a sexual harassment. However, his colleagues are still being sexually harassed by him even he is a ghost now...'The Queen of Gossip'- Amanda, who is the queen of gossip, is noisy and like to exaggerate everything. Even her friends can never escape from her, any good news of her friends will be violated and changed to a bad news. The stranges

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Wah is an unkempt, uneducated and undiplomatic guy who is doomed to be a loser of love. Bok Ping is a stylish Shanghai girl with a tycoon father. But Bok Ping decides to go to Hong Kong to seek her mother, who has departed from her when she was a child. She encounters Wah in the process and lives a simple life with Wah's mother. Wah, being influenced by Bok Ping, becomes more polite and cultured. Meanwhile, Bok Ping's father deems that Wah has kidnapped his daughter, but unexpectedly, Bok Ping has really been kidnapped...

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E4 - 跨專業求職要克服哪些難點？
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E6 - 吳鎮宇罵哭徐夢潔
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E4 - 跨專業求職要克服哪些難點？
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E44 - 陽光型男獲倒追
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。
